prompt: Minimalist app icon on pure black background. Two stylized crab claws (pincers) arranged symmetrically to form a pair of eyeglasses. Each claw curves to create a lens frame - left claw forms left lens, right claw forms right lens, connected by a thin bridge at center. The claws are sleek and elegant with subtle serrated pincer edges. Inside the LEFT lens: a large bold '>' (greater-than / chevron) symbol, centered. Inside the RIGHT lens: a large bold '_' (underscore / cursor) symbol, centered. Together they read as the terminal prompt '>_' split across both eyes. The > and _ should be thick, bold, and clearly readable. Everything in glowing neon green (#00FF41) on pure black, with soft phosphor CRT bloom/glow effect. Retro green monochrome terminal aesthetic. No other text or decorations. Ultra minimal, iconic, perfect as a small app icon.
